questionHtml: The mass of the wire is 18 g. The specific heat capacity of copper is 385 J kg−1 K−1. Estimate the increase in temperature of the wire.
markschemeHtml:
∆T=0.130.018×385 ✓

∆T=1.9×10-2 «K» ✓

 

Allow [2] marks for a bald correct answer.

Award [1] for a POT error in MP1.
